description: BK Simulator is a simple game where you walk to BK and back.

0.1.0.description: Initial Release! Play on web or show your support via the [Itch.io page](https://emilyv99.itch.io/bk-simulator)!
0.1.0.title: BK Simulator 0.1.0

0.1.1.description:
- Fix an issue when generating with `bksim.apworld` (the other files of this release are the same as v0.1.0)

Play on web or show your support via the [Itch.io page](https://emilyv99.itch.io/bk-simulator)!
0.1.1.title: BK Simulator 0.1.1

0.1.2.description:
Changelog:
- Add DeathLink support (Receiving deaths only)
- Add rain sounds

Play on web or show your support via the [Itch.io page](https://emilyv99.itch.io/bk-simulator)!
0.1.2.title: BK Simulator 0.1.2

1.0.0.description:
- New option (YAML and in-game): Death Link Groups!
  - With Death Link on, only receive deaths from others in the same group. (BK Simulator still never sends DeathLinks)
- APWorld rewritten to make use of Rule Builder. Logic should be unchanged.
1.0.0.title: BK Simulator 1.0.0

1.0.1.description:
- Disconnection from server will now properly kick you back to the main menu, preventing time being wasted on progress that isn't actually being saved.
- The message queue is now cleared on disconnection, so messages are no longer leftover from previous connections.
1.0.1.title: BK Simulator 1.0.1

1.0.2.description:
- Fixed the datastorage not properly supporting Teams. (This means any partial-walking-progress will be lost when loading an old game; i.e. you will be teleported back to home when you load an old game, regardless of if you were out on a walk or not, as the datastorage key has changed)
- Updated apworld manifest (now properly reports world_version + minimum_ap_version)
1.0.2.title: BK Simulator 1.0.2
